headline: How FirstEnergy’s $36 Billion Grid Upgrade Plan And Storm Response At FirstEnergy (FE) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent days, FirstEnergy Corp. restored power to more than 96% of the over 800,000 customers impacted by severe windstorms across Ohio, Pennsylvania, West Virginia and Maryland, mobilizing thousands of employees and external crews around the clock. At the same time, the company outlined a US$36.00 billion five-year grid investment plan aimed at improving reliability and resilience, underscoring how its emergency response efforts align with a longer-term push to modernize its network...
